my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation import with jakarta.annotation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Java 17.
Update the generated annotation comment to reflect the new JHipster version.
Replace javax.annotation with jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes required for Spring Boot 3.
Rename logger instance from lowercase 'log' to uppercase 'LOG' to follow standard Java naming conventions for static final fields.
Convert multi-line string concatenation in log message to Java 15+ text blocks for improved readability.
Extract application name property into a local variable to avoid redundant method calls and improve clarity.
Replace ternary operator with String.valueOf to prevent NullPointerException if e.getCause() returns null in the production logging branch.
Introduce a nested static class to encapsulate Liquibase-specific configuration properties.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.human_impl: public static class Liquibase { private Boolean asyncStart = true; ... }

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Add a field and getter for the new Liquibase configuration object in the main properties class.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.human_impl: private final Liquibase liquibase = new Liquibase(); public Liquibase getLiquibase() { return liquibase; }

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Rename the instance logger field to a static final constant following standard Java logging conventions.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.human_impl: Changed 'private final Logger log' to 'private static final Logger LOG' and updated usage.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Added import for java.util.List to support the new marker list handling logic.
Added class-level Javadoc explaining the security purpose of the CRLF log converter.
Renamed the constant SAFE_LOGGERS to SAFE_LOGS for better naming consistency.
Added Spring Boot autoconfigure and diagnostics loggers to the list of safe loggers that bypass CRLF filtering.
Updated the marker check logic to use getMarkerList() and check the first marker, likely to align with newer SLF4J/Logback API usage or fix a specific edge case.
Remove the LOGIN_REGEX constant from the Constants class.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.human_impl: Deleted the line defining public static final String LOGIN_REGEX.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Remove unused import for org.slf4j.Logger.
Remove unused import for org.slf4j.LoggerFactory.
Remove unused import for org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean.
Remove unused import for tech.jhipster.config.JHipsterConstants.
Replace Hibernate5Module with Hibernate6Module to align with the upgraded Hibernate version in the Java 17 environment.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.human_impl: import com.fasterxml.jackson.datatype.hibernate6.Hibernate6Module; ... public Hibernate6Module hibernate6Module() { return new Hibernate6Module(); }

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Enable serialization of identifiers for lazy-loaded objects in the new Hibernate6Module.
Add a custom serializer for LocalTime to ensure consistent string representation in JSON output.
Remove Zalando Problem and ConstraintViolationProblem modules from Jackson configuration.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.human_impl: Removed imports and beans for ProblemModule and ConstraintViolationProblemModule.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Rename logger instance to static final constant following standard Java naming conventions.
Inject ApplicationProperties to enable configuration-driven behavior for Liquibase startup mode.
Conditionally create async or sync Liquibase bean based on application properties instead of always using async.
Replace deprecated Profiles.of() with matchesProfiles() for profile checking.
Replace deprecated setContexts(List) with setContexts(String) using comma-delimited string conversion.
Replace deprecated setLabels(List) with setLabelFilter(String) using comma-delimited string conversion.
Import CollectionUtils and StringUtils to support null-safe checks and string conversion.
Remove the password grant type from the OAuth2 authorized client provider configuration.
Replace deprecated @EnableWebSecurity and @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with Spring Security 6 compatible @Configuration and @EnableMethodSecurity.
Update servlet imports from javax.servlet to jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers using MvcRequestMatcher for Spring Security 6 compatibility.
Replace manual CorsFilter injection with Spring Security 6's .cors(withDefaults()) DSL.
Update CSRF configuration to use the new lambda-based DSL and integrate a custom SpaCsrfTokenRequestHandler.
Update OAuth2 Login configuration to use the new lambda-based DSL and configure OIDC user service.
Update OAuth2 Resource Server configuration to use the new lambda-based DSL for JWT authentication.
Update OAuth2 Client configuration to use the new lambda-based DSL with defaults.
Remove dependency on SecurityProblemSupport and related exception handling configuration as it is no longer used or compatible.
Replace custom JwtGrantedAuthorityConverter bean with an inline Converter implementation using SecurityUtils.
Add a custom OidcUserService bean to handle OIDC user information and set the principal claim name.
Implement a custom SpaCsrfTokenRequestHandler to provide BREACH protection for Single-Page Applications.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.human_impl: static final class SpaCsrfTokenRequestHandler implements CsrfTokenRequestHandler { ... }

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Add a bean for MvcRequestMatcher.Builder to support the new request matching API.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.human_impl: @Bean MvcRequestMatcher.Builder mvc(HandlerMappingIntrospector introspector) { return new MvcRequestMatcher.Builder(introspector); }

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Update the Swagger UI path from /swagger-ui/** to /v3/api-docs/** to match OpenAPI 3.0 conventions.
Remove explicit permitAll for OPTIONS requests as CORS handling is now managed by the framework.
Remove explicit permitAll for /test/** path, likely no longer needed or handled differently.
